svg.text: Production-Grade Kubernetes Platform on AWS — HIPSTER-SHOP
Self-Managed · 6-Node HA · kubeadm · Calico · Istio · ArgoCD · Prometheus · Loki · Jaeger · Falco · Velero
VPC — 10.0.0.0/16 · DNS enabled · IGW + NAT Gateway
Kubernetes Cluster — kubeadm · Calico CNI · AWS CCM · StorageClass gp3 (default)
Namespace: hipster-shop · Istio sidecar injection enabled · mTLS STRICT
Ingress (nginx) → frontend:8080 · NetworkPolicy: default-deny + explicit allow rules
StorageClass gp3 (default) · encrypted · WaitForFirstConsumer · Retain · allowVolumeExpansion
